query: SELECT section, LEFT(title, 50) as title, LEFT(sourceUrl, 100) as url FROM news_items ORDER BY section, id LIMIT 12;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT section, LEFT(title, 50) as title, LEFT(sourceUrl, 100) as url FROM news_items ORDER BY section, id LIMIT 12;
